description: User hovers over the seat map area while reviewing options.
User clicks to select a seat, causing a loading spinner to appear.
The seat selection interface loads for Flight 2, displaying seat 5E as the selected option with pricing details.

Qantas and Virgin Australia logos are visible. page title is 'Select Seats'. page location is 'secure.flightcentre.com.au/AAXy9ikH/results#baggage'. page title is 'Flight Centre Australia'. interaction target is 'Seat 5E'. confidence is 1.0. frame description is 'Loading spinner followed by the appearance of the seat map and a selection tooltip.'.

description: User clicks the 'CONFIRM' button to finalize the selection of seat 5E.
